returns.data: A struct containing all dynamic CoW pool parameters
A struct containing all immutable CoW pool parameters

getTrustedCowRouter().details: The CoW Router address is registered in the factory. To minimize external calls from the pool to the factory, the trusted router address is cached within the pool. This variable has no setter; therefore, updating it requires calling `refreshTrustedCowRouter()`.

returns.cowRouter: The address of the trusted CoW Router

getCowPoolDynamicData().notice: Get dynamic pool data relevant to swap/add/remove calculations.

getCowPoolImmutableData().notice: Get immutable pool data relevant to swap/add/remove calculations.

refreshTrustedCowRouter().notice: Updates this pool's trusted router address to the current value in the CoW AMM Factory.
